message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="Re-review: CONSENT confirmed after fixes">
Kent here. Re-reviewed the updated commit `e55c052`.

The handler (`src/routes/index.rs`) and tests (`tests/api/index.rs`) are unchanged from my previous review -- still clean, still pass all four rules of simple design. The template changes are purely structural (moving links into the nav block, adding CSS classes) and don't affect the behavioral contracts tested.

All existing tests still pass, which confirms the refactoring didn't break behavior. That's exactly what tests are for -- confidence during change.

**CONSENT confirmed.** My previous review stands. No new TDD or design concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Thanks Kent. Same note as Marty -- that's a re-confirmation for Task #1 which is already pushed. We're now on **Task #2** (Playwright e2e testing, commit `c7c8074`). I'd value your TDD perspective on the e2e test structure -- particularly whether the test granularity is right (one large journey test vs. smaller focused tests).
